subcodes.title: Subhana Rabbiya'l-A'la
subcodes.first_line: Letter of eternity, put on the bridal trousseau of detachment and walk upon the exalted brocade runner; praised be my Lord, the most high.
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حرف البقاء البس نعلی الانقطاع ثم ارکب علی الرفرف الاعلی فسبحان من خلق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcending the material condition, @The Holy Spirit, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
